us_agent.narrative_tw: 最近看盤越來越不敢買…SPY 又跌了快 2%，群組裡一堆人在喊要崩盤了。VIX 衝到 22，感覺就是那種「要跌不跌」的尷尬感。不過仔細想想，上次大家這麼怕的時候，後來都漲回來了…要不要趣現在偷偷接一點？但萬一繼續跌怎麼辦…算了先觀望好了。
us_agent.narrative_en: Down almost 2% this month and my portfolio is bleeding. Everyone on Reddit says we're heading for a crash. VIX is at 22 and it just feels... uncomfortable. But honestly, last time everyone was this scared, we bounced hard. Maybe I should DCA a little bit? But what if it keeps dropping... ugh, I'll just wait and see.

tw_agent.narrative_tw: 加權指數終於從下面彈回來了，今天外資也終於買超了，可以鬆一口氣了吧？但我看了一下融資餘額，5 天就增加了快 2%，台積電的融資更誇張——一個月暴增 20%。感覺周圍的人又開始借錢買股了。上次這樣的時候…最後都是散戶被套。不過現在分數才 40，還沒到過熱，先觀察一下融資會不會繼續衡。
tw_agent.narrative_en: TAIEX finally bounced back and foreign investors flipped to buying today. Relief? But I checked margin balance -- up almost 2% in just 5 days. TSMC margin surged 20% in a month. Everyone around me is borrowing to buy stocks again. Last time this happened... retail got trapped. Score is only 40 though, not overheated yet. Let me watch if margin keeps climbing.

jp_agent.narrative_tw: 日經 55,000 付近，最近一個月跌了快 3%。我還是繼續定期定額買 NISA，不管漲跌都不會停…但說實話，看到日圓一直責（158.9），會擔心外資會不會繼續跑。不過出口股應該會受惠吧？RSI 已經 37 了，再跌一點我可能會加碼。
jp_agent.narrative_en: Nikkei around 55,000 and down nearly 3% this month. I'm sticking to my NISA contributions no matter what... but the yen keeps weakening at 158.9 and I'm worried foreign capital might keep leaving. Export stocks should benefit though, right? RSI is already at 37 -- if it drops a bit more, I might add to my position.

kr_agent.narrative_tw: KOSPI 最近衝了一波很猛——一週漲了快 5%，一個月漲超過 6%！群組裡全部都在喊行情來了，我也加碼了。當個開螟就是要追呢，現在不買就來不及了！不過說實話…這個速度有點太快了，上次 KOSPI 這樣的時候…算了不想了，先賺再說！
kr_agent.narrative_en: KOSPI is on FIRE -- up almost 5% this week and over 6% this month! Everyone in my KakaoTalk group is going all in. As gaemi, we go hard or go home. If I don't buy now I'll miss the whole move! But honestly... this pace feels a bit too fast. Last time KOSPI ran like this... nah, not thinking about it. Let's ride this wave!

eu_agent.narrative_tw: STOXX50 跌到 5,769，RSI 已經跌到 30 了，真的有點可怕。每天看新聞都是地緣政治和 ECB 利率的壞消息。我已經減倉了一部分，先守住現金比較安全。但一個月跌 4% 了…如果分數再跌到 30 以下，我可能會考慮進場。
eu_agent.narrative_en: STOXX50 dropped to 5,769 and RSI is at 30 -- that's properly oversold. Every day the news is geopolitics and ECB rate uncertainty. I've already reduced my positions, cash feels safer right now. Down 4% this month though... if the score drops below 30, I might consider getting back in.

summary.cross_market_view: US and EU in fear, KR overheated at 75.9. Classic divergence pattern.
summary.actionable_signal: SELECTIVE: US/EU fear historically favorable. Avoid chasing KR momentum.
